CVPR 25 2025 85.8 method, application

MaskGWM: A Generalizable Driving World Model with Video Mask Reconstruction

MaskGWM combines diffusion transformers with MAE-style mask reconstruction for generalizable driving world models, enabling long-horizon and multi-view video prediction.

PaperCode Analysis
arXiv 26.3 2026 85.4 method

RAE-NWM: Navigation World Model in Dense Visual Representation Space

Proposes RAE-NWM, a navigation world model using dense DINOv2 features and conditional diffusion transformer for improved structural stability and action accuracy.

PaperCode Analysis
arXiv 25.5 2025 81.4 benchmark

Toward Memory-Aided World Models: Benchmarking via Spatial Consistency

Proposes LoopNav, a Minecraft dataset and benchmark for evaluating spatial consistency in world models using loop-based navigation.

PaperCodeData Analysis
arXiv 24.3 2024 81.3 method

Dreaming of Many Worlds: Learning Contextual World Models Aids Zero-Shot Generalization

Proposes cRSSM, a contextual world model for Dreamer, improving zero-shot generalization to unseen dynamics in contextual RL.

PaperCode Analysis
NIPS 23 2023 80.2 method

STORM: Efficient Stochastic Transformer based World Models for Reinforcement Learning

STORM combines Transformers and VAEs for efficient world models in RL, achieving 126.7% human performance on Atari 100k with fast training.

PaperCode Analysis
ICML 24 2024 79.8 method, application

RoboDreamer: Learning Compositional World Models for Robot Imagination

RoboDreamer learns compositional world models by factorizing video generation from language, enabling generalization to unseen tasks and goals.

PaperCode Analysis
arXiv 25.6 2025 79.6 method

RoboScape: Physics-informed Embodied World Model

RoboScape is a physics-informed embodied world model that jointly learns RGB video generation and physics knowledge for realistic robotic video synthesis.

PaperCode Analysis
arXiv 25.4 2025 79.3 method

Unified World Models: Coupling Video and Action Diffusion for Pretraining on Large Robotic Datasets

UWM couples video and action diffusion in a unified transformer for pretraining on large robotic datasets, enabling policy and dynamics learning.

PaperCode Analysis
arXiv 26.2 2026 79 benchmark

MIND: Benchmarking Memory Consistency and Action Control in World Models

MIND is a benchmark for evaluating memory consistency and action control in world models using 250 high-quality videos across diverse scenes and action spaces.

arXiv 25.10 2025 78.4 method

A Comprehensive Survey on World Models for Embodied AI

A comprehensive survey proposing a unified framework and taxonomy for world models in embodied AI, covering functionality, temporal modeling, spatial representation, and open challenges.

NeurIPS 24 2024 78.4 method, application

Diffusion for World Modeling: Visual Details Matter in Atari

DIAMOND uses diffusion models for world modeling in Atari, achieving state-of-the-art agent performance with improved visual details.

ICML 24 2024 77.8 method

Improving Token-Based World Models with Parallel Observation Prediction

Proposes Parallel Observation Prediction to accelerate token-based world models, achieving 15.4x faster imagination and superhuman Atari performance.

Terra ACT-Bench: Towards Action Controllable World Models for Autonomous Driving

An open-source benchmark and baseline model for evaluating action fidelity in world models for autonomous driving.

NeurIPS 24 2024 77.5 method

Vista: A Generalizable Driving World Model with High Fidelity and Versatile Controllability

Vista is a generalizable driving world model with high fidelity and versatile controllability, outperforming prior methods on multiple datasets.

arXiv 25.4 2025 77 method, system, application

MineWorld: a Real-Time and Open-Source Interactive World Model on Minecraft

MineWorld is a real-time interactive world model for Minecraft using a visual-action autoregressive Transformer with parallel decoding, outperforming diffusion-based models.

arXiv 25.12 2025 76.4 method, system

Astra: General Interactive World Model with Autoregressive Denoising

Astra is an interactive general world model using autoregressive denoising for long-term video prediction with action control across diverse real-world tasks.

CVPR 24 2024 76.1 method, application

Driving into the Future: Multiview Visual Forecasting and Planning with World Model for Autonomous Driving

Drive-WM: a driving world model that generates multiview videos for safe planning by forecasting multiple futures and selecting optimal trajectories via image-based rewards.

ICLR 26 2026 76 method

From Observations to Events: Event-Aware World Model for Reinforcement Learning

Proposes Event-Aware World Model (EAWM) that learns event representations from raw observations to improve MBRL generalization and robustness.

arXiv 25.7 2025 75.7 method, system

Yume: An Interactive World Generation Model

Yume generates interactive, dynamic worlds from images using keyboard control, with a framework including camera motion quantization, MVDT, and advanced sampling.

arXiv 24.10 2024 75.2 method

AVID: Adapting Video Diffusion Models to World Models

AVID adapts pretrained video diffusion models to action-conditioned world models using a learned mask, without accessing model parameters.

A survey on interactive video world modeling, covering frontiers, challenges, benchmarks, and future trends.

FAR-Drive: Frame-AutoRegressive Video Generation in Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving

FAR-Drive proposes a frame-level autoregressive video generation framework for closed-loop autonomous driving simulation, achieving state-of-the-art on nuScenes.

Pre-Trained Video Generative Models as World Simulators

Proposes Dynamic World Simulation (DWS) to turn pre-trained video generative models into controllable world simulators using action-conditioned modules and motion-reinforced loss.

Solving Motion Planning Tasks with a Scalable Generative Model

A scalable generative model for autonomous driving that learns scene dynamics, enabling simulation, scenario generation, and planning, achieving SOTA on real-world benchmarks.

BEVWorld: A Multimodal World Model for Autonomous Driving via Unified BEV Latent Space

BEVWorld transforms multimodal sensor inputs into unified BEV latent space for autonomous driving, using a tokenizer and diffusion model to forecast future scenes.

Epona: Autoregressive Diffusion World Model for Autonomous Driving

Epona is an autoregressive diffusion world model for autonomous driving enabling long-horizon video prediction and trajectory planning with state-of-the-art performance.

Learning Transferable Dynamics Priors from Action to World Modeling

Pretraining an action-conditioned diffusion world model on robot data yields transferable dynamics priors for simulation and policy learning.

GeoDrive: 3D Geometry-Informed Driving World Model with Precise Action Control

GeoDrive integrates 3D geometry into driving world models for precise action control, improving spatial awareness and scene modeling.

arXiv 25.9 2025 74 method

LongScape: Advancing Long-Horizon Embodied World Models with Context-Aware MoE

LongScape combines intra-chunk diffusion and inter-chunk autoregression with action-guided chunking and Context-aware MoE for stable long-horizon video generation in embodied world models.

ICLR 23 2023 73.9 method

Transformer-based World Models Are Happy with 100k Interactions

A transformer-based world model (TWM) achieves sample-efficient RL on Atari 100k by autoregressively processing states, actions, and rewards.

arXiv 26.1 2026 73.7 benchmark, application

DrivingGen: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Generative Video World Models in Autonomous Driving

DrivingGen is the first comprehensive benchmark for generative driving world models, with new metrics and diverse data to evaluate visual realism, trajectory plausibility, temporal coherence, and controllability.

arXiv 24.6 2024 73.6 method

Multimodal foundation world models for generalist embodied agents

GenRL uses multimodal foundation world models to connect VLMs with generative world models for RL, enabling task specification via vision/language and multi-task generalization.

World Modeling Workshop 26 2026 73.5 method, application

Probing the effectiveness of World Models for Spatial Reasoning through Test-time Scaling

Examines test-time verifiers for world-model-based spatial reasoning, finding pitfalls and introducing ViSA, which improves on SAT-Real but not MMSI-Bench.

ICLR 26 2026 73.5 method

R2-Dreamer: Redundancy-Reduced World Models without Decoders or Augmentation

R2-Dreamer introduces a redundancy-reduction objective for decoder-free MBRL, achieving faster training and competitive performance without data augmentation.

arXiv 23.9 2023 73.3 method, application

ADriver-I: A General World Model for Autonomous Driving

ADriver-I is a general world model for autonomous driving using interleaved vision-action pairs, MLLM, and diffusion to predict control signals and future frames.

Is Sora a World Simulator? A Comprehensive Survey on General World Models and Beyond

A comprehensive survey of general world models, focusing on Sora's simulation capabilities, generative video, autonomous driving, and autonomous agents.

Bridging Scene Generation and Planning: Driving with World Model via Unifying Vision and Motion Representation

WorldDrive unifies vision and motion representation in a driving world model to couple scene generation and real-time planning.

ICRA 26 2026 72.7 method, application

UniFuture: A 4D Driving World Model for Future Generation and Perception

UniFuture is a unified 4D driving world model that jointly generates future RGB and depth sequences, outperforming specialized models on nuScenes and Waymo.

arXiv 25.9 2025 72.7 method, system, application

KeyWorld: Key Frame Reasoning Enables Effective and Efficient World Models

KeyWorld uses key frame reasoning to accelerate robotic world models by focusing computation on semantic key frames, achieving 5.68x speedup on LIBERO.

Learning to Model the World with Language

Dynalang learns a multimodal world model from diverse language to predict future observations and rewards, enabling game-playing and navigation in photorealistic homes.

Causal World Modeling for Robot Control

Introduces LingBot-VA, an autoregressive diffusion framework for video world modeling and robot control, evaluated in simulation and real-world.

Unified World Models: Memory-Augmented Planning and Foresight for Visual Navigation

UniWM integrates visual foresight and planning in a unified memory-augmented world model for visual navigation, achieving up to 30% improvement on benchmarks.

Learning Real-World Action-Video Dynamics with Heterogeneous Masked Autoregression

HMA uses heterogeneous masked autoregression to model action-video dynamics for robot learning, achieving faster and more controllable video generation.

LiveWorld: Simulating Out-of-Sight Dynamics in Generative Video World Models

LiveWorld extends video world models to simulate persistent out-of-sight dynamics using a global state and monitor-based mechanism, evaluated on LiveBench.

OccSora is a diffusion-based 4D occupancy generation model that simulates driving scenes as a world simulator for autonomous driving.

LatentDriver uses a latent world model with mixture distributions to handle uncertainty and self-delusion in autonomous driving, outperforming SOTA on Waymax.
